channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 15 domande sulla trasformazione digitale alle quali ogni CIO deve rispondere
item.description: La trasformazione digitale (DX) [in inglese] rimane al centro dell’attenzione dei CIO, con molteplici analisi e studi che indicano come rimanga una delle priorità assolute per i leader IT anche alla luce di un decennio di iniziative in tal senso.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Greene takes fire for remarks about weather
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) has again thrown herself at the center of controversy over her embrace of claims that the government and humans are “controlling” the severe weather as Hurricane Milton barrels toward Florida.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Hurricane Milton: A Rare Threat to the Gulf Coast
item.description: Hurricane Milton powers into a rare threat, fueled by warm water and a unique track, raising concerns for the Gulf Coast, particularly Tampa, which hasn't had a direct hit from a major storm in over 100 years.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Taiwanese Manufacturer Foxconn Brings Electric Vehicles to the Global Market
item.description: Taiwanese consumer electronics manufacturer Foxconn reveals its plans to enter the electric vehicle market with two new models, Model D and Model U, targeting the North American market.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Gemini Code Assist Enterprise Revolutionizes Cloud-Based Development - Google Cloud's Latest Innovation
item.description: Google Cloud announces Gemini Code Assist Enterprise, a cloud-based AI-powered development solution that provides better contextual suggestions, enterprise-grade security commitments, and integrations across the technology stack.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Big shift in IT employment shows new skills are needed
item.description: Multiple research firms reported that the unemployment rate for IT workers dropped precipitously last month — in one instance, by nearly 37% — a decline that marked a serious shift from months of incremental increases mixed with plateaus in unemployment.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk steps up Starlink access as Hurricane Milton approaches Florida
item.description: SpaceX and CEO Elon Musk ramped up the rollout of Starlink's direct-to-cell service for areas expected to be hit Wednesday by Hurricane Milton, marking the latest assistance efforts by the aerospace company.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: iPhone update allows users to text for help when there's no cell service. How it works
item.description: With Hurricane Milton barreling toward Florida's Gulf Coast, many Tampa Bay area residents are fearing widespread and potentially weeks-long power outages, which could affect cellphone service, as many saw during Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, The Hill

item.title: Federal Executive Forum Customer Experience Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2024
item.description: Improving customer experience (CX) is a multi-faceted challenge to tackle as needs vary between stakeholders.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to remotely fix family computer woes
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores how you can help troubleshoot a computer issue remotely on Windows or a Mac. There are a variety of options.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
